CustomField.formula: IF( ISPICKVAL( leaseworks__Engine_Manufacturer__c , 'CFM') , leaseworks__Aircraft_Base_Price__r.leaseworks__Airframe_Base_Price_DP_with_CFM__c, IF( ISPICKVAL( leaseworks__Engine_Manufacturer__c , 'PW') , leaseworks__Aircraft_Base_Price__r.leaseworks__Airframe_Base_Price_DP_with_PW__c , leaseworks__Aircraft_Base_Price__r.leaseworks__Airframe_Base_Price_DP_with_RR__c))
CustomField.label: Airframe Base Price (DP)
